title: JRZD-986 First Shooting Married Woman Document Sayaka Koike
description: Sayaka Koike is 38 years old. A family of three, a husband of an office worker and a son of a student. I used to work as a scuba diving instructor and got acquainted with my husband there and got married. The instructor quit after giving birth, but he is still diving once every six months. Sayaka-san's sex situation is lonely with her husband once a month or not, but she seems to have a saffle, and she is quite active with that person five times a month. This time, I went to Tokyo for my husband's business trip. "I've always been interested in AV, but I thought I couldn't miss this chance (laughs)." I promise you a pleasure that exceeds Sayaka's expectations, so stay tuned! !!
